xml.prelim_text:
We've all seen scientists on television and in the movies, but
what do they really look like?

Could you decide who's the scientist in a group of people?

Select Continue to find out more.

spiel.transcript: Hello! You're probably thinking, 'Oh, another mad scientist'. But ha! I'm just a stereotype. Appearances can be deceiving. In this activity, you'll discover the many different faces of science.
To start, flip the panels to find the scientist, then select Check it. When you've unmasked the scientist, you can learn all about what they do. Prepare to be surprised!

Well done! If you found it difficult to pick a scientist, I'm not surprised. They don't really look any different from anyone else - and most look nothing like me! Select Continue to find out more about this scientist.

feedback.correct:
Yes! You have found a scientist.
Select Continue to find out more.
feedback.wrongPerson: You have found a person but they are not a scientist.
feedback.noFace: You have found an interesting face, but it is not all the same person.

randomP.name: Robert
randomP.info: Hi, I'm Robert. I'm an accountant. I'm not a scientist, but I use the Internet and email, which are products of science.

randomP.name: Saumitra
randomP.info: Hi, I'm Saumitra. I'm a builder. I'm not a scientist, but I use scientific knowledge to build energy-efficient houses.

randomP.name: Tracey
randomP.info: Hi, I'm Tracey. I'm a computer programmer. I'm not a scientist, but I work with computers, which are the products of science.

randomP.name: Karli
randomP.info: Hi, I'm Karli. I work in a chemist shop. I'm not a scientist, but all the drugs and medicines I work with are the result of medical science.

randomP.name: Briana
randomP.info: Hi, I'm Briana. I'm a pilot. I'm not a scientist, but science is all around me, from the plane I fly to the navigation equipment that guides it.

mediaRoom.helptext:
Find out more about this scientist by going through all the information in the Media room.


Then flip the panels, choosing the three that respond to the questions about the scientist. Select Check it to see if you're correct.

feedback.correct: Excellent! You've answered all the questions correctly. Here's some more interesting information about this scientist.
feedback.incorrect: Some of the information doesn't match this scientist. Try again.
feedback.hint1: The incorrect panels are highlighted. Try again.
feedback.hint2: Look for the answers in the highlighted sections of the Media room.

tile.question: What else am I interested in apart from science?
What area of science do I work in?
